en: Now, to be a true master chef,
you have to be able to take a stunning bird like this
and break it down into all its delicious parts. Yep.
ko: 맛있는 부위로 나눌 수 있어야 해. 맞아.

en: Honestly, for me, I could do it with my eyes closed.
ko: 솔직히 말해서, 나는 눈을 감고도 할 수 있어.

en: All right, well, here's the deal. Go on.
Put that on for size, my friend.
Mmm. Lord, have mercy. Oh, my gosh.
He's actually gonna cut up this chicken with a blindfold? Wow.
ko: 저 사람이 눈가리개를 하고 이 닭을 자를 거라고? 와우.

en: Two drums, two thighs, two wings, two breasts, one carcass. You watching up there?
ko: 두 개의 다리, 두 개의 허벅지, 두 개의 날개, 두 개의 가슴, 하나의 뼈대. 위에서 보고 있어?

en: Lift up the knife, pierce back the skin, and literally slice through.
ko: 칼을 들어서, 피부를 찔러서, 실제로 썰어.

en: Pull back, pop out that joint.
